competitors.name: ts-run-types (type)
competitors.source: {build: () => createValidate<{name: string; getName(): string} | {age: number; getAge(): number}>(), buildErrors: () => noErrs(createGetValidationErrors<{name: string; getName(): string} | {age: number; getAge(): number}>())}

competitors.name: ts-run-types (schema)
competitors.source:
() =>
    createValidate(
      RT.union([
        RT.object({name: RT.string(), getName: RT.func([], RT.string())}),
        RT.object({age: RT.number(), getAge: RT.func([], RT.number())}),
      ])
    )
